description: VinylPod Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) — BACKEND ONLY. Captures now-playing data (title/artist/artwork/isPlaying/currentTime/duration) from web players and exposes bidirectional control. No popup/UI.

Manifest_V3_Setup.notes: MV3, service_worker, host_permissions, content_scripts (per-site + universal MAIN/relay).

Background_Service_Worker.notes: Central state store per tab, message router, control relay, best-effort WS push to native app.

Message_Passing_Bridge.notes: Shared isolated-world runner: poll readState(), diff, report; listen for control msgs -> adapter.controls.

MediaSession_Fallback_Listener.notes: MAIN-world reads navigator.mediaSession + media element; relay forwards to SW; control via media element.

Playback_Controller.notes: Control path: SW -> chrome.tabs.sendMessage -> content script -> DOM click / media element; covered across cs-common + adapters.
